summary: Frontend regression smoke for NULLAI V2 refactor. All previously-verified data-testids still resolve to the correct DOM, content matches V2 spec, live tokenomics RPC settles to LIVE within ~6s, refresh re-syncs successfully, and the console is clean (0 errors, 0 warnings — including no React 'unique key' warnings from the WhitepaperSection refactor). Refactor verified non-regressive.
verified_assertions: top-banner renders V2 banner text
hero-title 'The Autonomous Scarcity Organism', hero-subtitle present, hero-cta-primary 'Launchpad Incoming // SOON', hero-cta-manifesto 'Read the Manifesto'
hero-logomark renders the giant '0' character (HeroLogomark subcomponent)
primary-contract-address = 0x86aC40CD4c57f68E89c515BF45d9fD19d7CcF095, primary-contract-copy-btn present and clickable without throwing
3 contract rows: contract-row-{nullai-token, vortexengine, oraclemanager}
3 contract copy buttons: contract-copy-{nullai-token, vortexengine, oraclemanager} (clicking does not emit console.error)
3 BaseScan links: contract-scan-{nullai-token, vortexengine, oraclemanager} all target=_blank, rel='noopener noreferrer', href correctly built on basescan.org
audit-verdict 'VERDICT: SAFE FOR MAINNET' rendered
5 feature cards rendered (feature-card-*)
6 whitepaper section testids: whitepaper-{thesis,vision,architecture,security,economics,philosophy} (stable composed keys, no React duplicate-key warning)
footer-link-x and footer-link-telegram are external (target=_blank, rel='noopener noreferrer'); footer-disclaimer present
tokenomics-rpc-status reaches 'RPC · BASE MAINNET' (LIVE) within ~6s
tokenomics-live-totalsupply contains '1,000,000,000 NULLAI' with LIVE badge
tokenomics-live-burned contains '0 NULLAI' with LIVE badge
tokenomics-live-burnratio contains '0.0000%' with LIVE badge
scarcity-pulse-value '0.0000%' inside scarcity-pulse with 'BEATING' badge text
tokenomics-item-0/1/2 preserve static V2 values (1B NULLAI, 1M NULLAI 0.1%, PinkSale 100% locked)
tokenomics-refresh-btn click triggers re-fetch — RPC pill remains 'RPC · BASE MAINNET' and sync resets to 'just now'
Console: 0 errors, 0 warnings, 0 React 'unique key' warnings on initial load and after copy/refresh interactions
No console.error fired from PrimaryContractBox or ContractsList during normal copy operation (clipboard succeeded)
critical_code_review_comments: Refactor scope is clean: shared constants centralized in /config/constants.js, hero/footer/tokenomics decomposed into focused subcomponents (each <200 lines), keyframes moved out of JSX into App.css per previous iteration_2 suggestion.
Stable composed keys in WhitepaperSection (`${section.id}-p-${slug}` / `${section.id}-li-${slug}`) eliminate the array-index key risk and produce zero React warnings in the rendered DOM.

Catch blocks in PrimaryContractBox and ContractsList now log via console.error only on real clipboard failure — verified no log fires during a successful copy in the preview env. Optional micro-suggestion: also surface a non-blocking UI error state when clipboard rejects (currently only logged), so users on browsers without clipboard API get visible feedback.

useNullaiOnChain still polls every POLLING_INTERVAL_MS (15s) without AbortController on unmount; aliveRef gates state updates which is acceptable, but consider AbortController to also cancel in-flight fetches and free the connection slot on rapid route/teardown.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Refactor pass verified non-regressive on https://nullai-mainnet.preview.emergentagent.com. Important data-testid naming nuances to remember (NOT renamed in this refactor): hero secondary CTA = `hero-cta-manifesto` (NOT `hero-cta-secondary`); BaseScan links = `contract-scan-{slug}` (NOT `contract-basescan-*`); whitepaper sections = `whitepaper-{section.id}` where ids are thesis/vision/architecture/security/economics/philosophy (the wrapper itself is `whitepaper-section`). Scarcity Pulse uses 'BEATING' badge (not 'LIVE'). Wait ~5-6s after navigation for RPC failover to settle before asserting LIVE state.
